hooks.command: PROJ=/Users/octiv/Octiv_MVP; MEM=/Users/octiv/.claude/projects/-Users-octiv-Octiv-MVP/memory; COMMIT=$(git -C $PROJ log --oneline -1 2>/dev/null); BRANCH=$(git -C $PROJ branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); MOD=$(git -C $PROJ diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); REDIS=$(redis-cli -p 6380 ping 2>/dev/null || echo 'DOWN'); DOCK=$(docker ps --format '{{.Names}}' 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); ML=$([ -f $MEM/MEMORY.md ] && wc -l < $MEM/MEMORY.md | tr -d ' ' || echo '0'); SL=$([ -f $MEM/session-log.md ] && wc -l < $MEM/session-log.md | tr -d ' ' || echo '0'); echo "[Octiv] $BRANCH:${COMMIT} | Δ${MOD} | redis:$REDIS | docker:${DOCK} | mem:${ML}L log:${SL}L"

INPUT=$(cat); echo "$INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit' && { PROJ=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo /Users/octiv/Octiv_MVP); cd "$PROJ" && echo '[PreCommit] Syntax check...' && node -c agent/builder.js && node -c agent/leader.js && node -c agent/safety.js && node -c agent/team.js && node -c agent/blackboard.js && node -c agent/mcp-server.js && node -c agent/mcp-orchestrator.js && echo '[PreCommit] All syntax checks passed'; } || true
INPUT=$(cat); echo "$INPUT" | grep -qiE 'FLUSH(DB|ALL)' && { echo '[BLOCKED] Redis flush operation denied'; exit 1; } || true
INPUT=$(cat); echo "$INPUT" | grep -q 'rcon' && echo "$INPUT" | grep -qE '(op |ban |stop |whitelist )' && { echo '[BLOCKED] Dangerous RCON command denied'; exit 1; } || true

INPUT=$(cat); echo "$INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit' && { MEM=/Users/octiv/.claude/projects/-Users-octiv-Octiv-MVP/memory; COMMIT=$(git -C /Users/octiv/Octiv_MVP log --oneline -1 2>/dev/null); echo "- [$(date '+%H:%M')] committed: $COMMIT" >> $MEM/session-log.md && echo '[AutoMemory] Commit logged to session-log'; } || true

MEM_DIR=/Users/octiv/.claude/projects/-Users-octiv-Octiv-MVP/memory; TS=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M'); echo "## Auto-save before compaction — $TS" >> $MEM_DIR/session-log.md && echo "- Last commit: $(git -C /Users/octiv/Octiv_MVP log --oneline -1 2>/dev/null)" >> $MEM_DIR/session-log.md && echo "- Modified: $(git -C /Users/octiv/Octiv_MVP diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ', ')" >> $MEM_DIR/session-log.md && echo "- AC Status: $(redis-cli -p 6380 hgetall octiv:ac:progress 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ' ' || echo 'redis down')" >> $MEM_DIR/session-log.md && echo '[PreCompact] Memory + AC status auto-saved'
